scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api -c blue,green "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:api"
scripts.deploy:web: cd packages/web && npm run build && pm2 restart ai-chat-web
scripts.deploy:api: cd packages/server && .venv/bin/pip3 install -r requirements.txt && pm2 restart ai-chat-server
scripts.deploy: npm run deploy:web && npm run deploy:api
